game_info.title: Kingdom Crashers
game_info.concept:
Hack, slash, and smash your way to victory in this award winning 2D arcade adventure from The Behemoth! Steam URL: https://store.steampowered.com/app/204360/Castle_Crashers/ ================================================================================ Full Description: ================================================================================ Hack, slash, and smash your way to victory in this award winning 2D arcade adventure from The Behemoth!

Hack, slash, and smash your way to victory in this 2D sidescrolling arcade adventure from The Behemoth! Play with up to four friends locally or online to defend the kingdom, save the princesses, and crash some castles!

Key Features

  • Unlock more than 25 characters and over 40 different weapons!

  • Level up your character with skill points and adjust Strength, Magic, Defense, and Agility to your liking.

  • Intuitive magic and combo system: unlock an arsenal of new attacks as your character progresses through the game.

  • Local or online co-op gameplay: pick up and continue the adventure with your friends at the drop of a helmet!

  • Collect adorable animal orbs for your companions, each with different abilities to aid you on your journey.

Game Modes

  • Arena: battle other players in team matches or free-for-all!

  • Insane Mode: test your skills in the ULTIMATE campaign challenge!

  • Back Off Barbarian: jump and hop across the level to avoid the enemies in this minigame!

DLC

Enhance the standard gameplay experience with the Blacksmith and Pink Knight character packs, or unlock Paint Junior and custom character capabilities with the new Painter Boss Paradise DLC!

The Painter Boss Paradise DLC also includes:

  • A custom character template

  • New art for all official playable characters and weapons!

  • New map art for fancier adventuring!

  • Endless knightly possibilities - choose from community characters or preloaded characters created by our team!

Worried about buying the DLC and missing the nostalgic feel of the original art? Have no fear, as you can toggle the Painter Boss Paradise DLC’s functionality on or off from the main menu at any time to experience the classic adventure! Check out the DLC store page linked above to learn more!
game_info.description: Kingdom Crashers is a 2D side-scrolling beat 'em up adventure. You play as a valiant knight tasked with defending the kingdom from an invasion of barbarians and dark forces. Battle through waves of enemies using your sword and shield. Master the art of combat with combos, blocking, and jumping attacks. Defeat the Barbarian King to restore peace to the land!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move character (Left/Right to run, Up/Down for depth)
Space: Jump
Z: Attack (Mash for combo)
Shift: Block / Shield
Enter: Start Game
Esc: Pause / Resume
R: Restart (on Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic Movement and Stability Test. The goal is to verify that the player character can move, jump, and attack without causing runtime errors or physics glitches.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller will emit random movement inputs (arrows), occasional jumps (Space), and attacks (Z). It ignores enemies and focuses on input responsiveness and state transitions.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game runs for at least 30 seconds without crashing. The player changes states (Idle -> Run -> Jump -> Attack) correctly based on inputs.

TEST_1.expected: The game runs for at least 30 seconds without crashing. The player changes states (Idle -> Run -> Jump -> Attack) correctly based on inputs.

TEST_2.test_description: Combat AI / Win Condition Test. The goal is to verify that the game can be beaten by effectively engaging enemies.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The test controller implements a heuristic AI: Locate nearest enemy, align Y-axis position, move within attack range, and spam attack (Z). If an enemy is attacking, use Block (Shift).
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player successfully defeats the waves of enemies and triggers the "GAME_OVER_WIN" state within a reasonable timeframe (e.g., 2-3 minutes).

TEST_3.test_description: Boundary and Collision Stress Test. Verifies that the player cannot leave the playable area.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The controller continuously forces the player towards the edges of the screen (Left, Right, Top, Bottom) and jumps repeatedly against boundaries.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The player's position remains within the defined level boundaries defined in the physics system.
